rationale: The constitutional provision exempts the first $3,000 of residential homestead value from county road/flood control levies, establishing a floor. A statutory increase to $200,000 under Tax Code §11.13(b) exceeds but does not contravene this minimum.
quote: except the first Three Thousand Dollars ($3,000) value of residential homesteads of married or unmarried adults, including those living alone
_note: Constitutional provision sets a minimum homestead exemption for county road/flood taxes; statute may exceed it without conflict.
